one_time_description: Additional COVID-19 funding received from Indigenous Services Canada and other sources for public health measures, income assistance, and reopening costs
economic_notes: Sturgeon Lake Resources Ltd. fully consolidated (no longer meets GBE definition). Sturgeon Lake Developments Co. Ltd. accounted for by modified equity method. COVID-19 caused decline in business revenues and operational disruptions. Nation is member of Western Cree Tribal Council.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2021. Sturgeon Lake Resources Ltd. changed from modified equity (GBE) to full consolidation in current year; comparative 2020 figures restated accordingly. Sturgeon Lake Developments Co. Ltd. remains as GBE under modified equity. No schedule of remuneration included in extracted text. Total government transfers estimated as WCTC (12,888,942) + ISC Health (3,349,259) + GoA (196,582) + CMHC (919,780) + FNDF (1,089,530) = 18,444,093 but FNDF may be provincial; isc_funding includes only ISC Health line as ISC specifically identified. Net financial assets is negative (net debt) of $16,783,791. COVID-19 additional funding of $4,212,417 received. No remuneration schedule present in document.
